# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Refactor with no intended behavior change
- [ ] Test/diagnostic improvement

## Validation performed

- [ ] App/package starts from the documented entry point
- [ ] Smoke tests or available diagnostics were run
- [ ] README/docs updated where needed
- [ ] No secrets, generated databases, private logs, or local machine paths committed
- [ ] Existing features were preserved unless explicitly removed by design

## Notes for reviewer

Mention any risks, known limitations, or follow-up work.
